heading: Implementation of a sentence
label: 3558 Implementation of a sentence
text: The implementation of a sentence imposed pursuant to section 3551 is governed by the provisions of chapter 229.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , and applicable only to offenses committed after the taking effect of this section, see , set out as a note under .Nov. 1, 1987section 235(a)(1) of Pub. L. 98–473section 3551 of this title
